n: The Forgotten Treasury: A Relic of Ages Past

steps.t: Garthar is in the Deep Descent of Moria. Falgir confided in you about the discovery of crystals thought long lost, now turning up all throughout Moria…
Falgir is in the Deep Descent in Moria. Garthar told you a bit of history of the vaults in Moria, what they held and how he fears that one such vault …
